title: Wall St Week Ahead: Industrial sector's gains to be tested as earnings ramp up
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The industrial sector's strong performance is facing scrutiny as earnings increase. The S&P 500 industrials index has outperformed the broader S&P 500 this year
excerpt: The industrial sector's strong performance is facing scrutiny as earnings increase. The S&P 500 industrials index has outperformed the broader S&P 500 this year. Investors will watch closely to see if the sector can maintain its gains.
